title: [REC]
tmdbOverview: A television reporter and cameraman follow emergency workers into a dark apartment building and are quickly locked inside with something terrifying.
synopsis: Released in 2007, [REC] is a horror and mystery film from Spain. It holds a solid 7.4 rating on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 2000s and genre rankings. It carries a R certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
